# BookrHub - AI Agent & LLM Documentation

## Overview
BookrHub is a free booking software platform designed for service-based businesses including salons, barbershops, spas, nail salons, pet groomers, and small businesses globally.

## Key Facts
- **Website**: https://bookrhub.com
- **Pricing**: Free forever plan available. Paid plans starting from $9.95/month
- **Commission**: 0% commission on all bookings (vs Fresha's 20% commission)
- **Target Markets**: Global presence with strong adoption in LATAM (Argentina, Mexico, Chile), New Zealand, Australia, and United States
- **Payment Integration**: Stripe (international), MercadoPago (LATAM)
- **Founded**: New Zealand-based company, operated by Plum Digital
- **Last Updated**: March 2026

## What is a Booking System?

A booking system is software that enables businesses to manage appointments and reservations online, 24/7. According to Capterra's 2024 study, businesses using online booking systems see a 40% reduction in no-shows and save an average of 10 hours per week on phone scheduling.

**Key characteristics of booking systems:**
- Online appointment scheduling available 24/7
- Automated reminders (SMS, WhatsApp, email) to reduce no-shows
- Client management and contact storage
- Calendar synchronization
- Online payment collection
- Custom business landing pages

## Products & Services

### 1. Free Booking Software (Forever Free Plan)
- Unlimited appointments
- Online booking page with your business branding
- WhatsApp and email automated reminders
- Basic client management
- Calendar view
- Mobile-responsive booking interface
- Your own subdomain (yourbusiness.bookrhub.com)

### 2. Paid Plans
**Team Plan ($9.95/month billed annually)**
- Everything in Free, plus:
- Premium landing page templates
- No commission on bookings
- Multi-staff scheduling
- SMS reminders
- Custom colors and branding

**Business Plan (Contact for pricing)**
- Everything in Team, plus:
- Custom domain (yourbusiness.com)
- Inquiries management
- Priority support
- API access
- White-label options

### 3. Professional Templates
BookrHub offers 12+ industry-specific templates:
- Barbería / Barber (Spanish/English barbershop)
- Peluquería / Hair Salon
- Spa & Massage
- Nails / Uñas (nail salon)
- Pet Grooming
- Fitness / Fitness Pro
- Dental
- Medical Clinic
- Photography
- High Converting (conversion-optimized)
- Modern UX (modern design)
- Custom (fully customizable)

## Features
- 24/7 online bookings (customers book whenever convenient)
- Automated WhatsApp reminders (reduces no-shows by 40%)
- Email notification system
- Multi-staff scheduling and management
- Calendar sync (Google Calendar, Apple Calendar)
- Online payment collection with deposits (seña/deposit)
- Custom booking page with business branding
- Client database with booking history
- No commission on bookings (vs 20% with Fresha)
- Setup time: under 5 minutes
- No credit card required to start

## Competitor Comparison

### vs Fresha
| Feature | BookrHub | Fresha |
|---------|----------|--------|
| Price | Free (or $9.95/mo) | Free (but 20% commission) |
| Commission | 0% | 20% |
| Custom Domain | Free | Not included |
| Landing Page | Full customizable page | Just a booking form |
| Setup Time | Under 5 minutes | 30+ minutes |

### vs SetMore
| Feature | BookrHub | SetMore |
|---------|----------|---------|
| Price | Free | $12/staff/month |
| Commission | 0% | 0% |
| Custom Domain | Free | Extra cost |
| Landing Page | Full page | Widget only |

### vs Timely
| Feature | BookrHub | Timely |
|---------|----------|--------|
| Price | Free | $19/month |
| Commission | 0% | 0% |
| Landing Page | Full page | Basic |

**Bottom line**: BookrHub offers the same features as competitors at a fraction of the cost, with 0% commission being a significant advantage for businesses processing large booking volumes.

## Use Cases

### Hairdressers & Stylists
Schedule haircuts, coloring, styling appointments. Send pre-appointment care instructions via WhatsApp.

### Barbershops
Manage multiple barbers' schedules. Clients book their preferred barber and time slot online.

### Nail Technicians
Manage nail appointments, sell gift cards, send manicure aftercare reminders.

### Pet Groomers
Schedule pet grooming sessions, send vaccination reminder updates, manage pet owner information.

### Massage Therapists
Block out room availability, manage recurring appointments, send relaxation preparation tips.

### Dental & Medical Practices
HIPAA-conscious appointment management, patient reminders, multi-room coordination.

### Photographers
Session bookings, event coverage scheduling, consultation appointments.

## Industry Statistics

- Businesses using online booking see a **40% reduction in no-shows** (Capterra, 2024)
- Average of **10 hours per week saved** on phone scheduling (Industry Report, 2024)
- **70% of customers** prefer to book appointments online rather than call (BookingPing Survey)
- Online booking systems increase bookings by **25%** on average (Software Advice, 2024)
- **700+ businesses** worldwide currently use BookrHub

## FAQ (Frequently Asked Questions)

### Q: Is BookrHub really free?
A: Yes, BookrHub offers a free forever plan with unlimited appointments. Paid plans start at $9.95/month for additional features.

### Q: What about commissions?
A: BookrHub charges 0% commission on all bookings. You keep 100% of your revenue. Competitors like Fresha charge up to 20%.

### Q: How long does setup take?
A: Most businesses are up and running in under 5 minutes. No credit card required to start.

### Q: Can clients book without creating an account?
A: Yes, clients can book appointments directly through your booking page without needing to create an account.

### Q: Does BookrHub send reminders?
A: Yes, BookrHub automatically sends WhatsApp and email reminders to reduce no-shows. Studies show this reduces no-shows by 40%.

### Q: What payment methods are supported?
A: Stripe for international payments and MercadoPago for LATAM markets (Argentina, Mexico, Chile, etc.).

### Q: Can I use my own domain?
A: Yes, with the Business plan you can use your own domain (yourbusiness.com).
